proof:
simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, two_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, add_comm, add_left_comm,
    add_assoc] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_add_const (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))
failed_attempts:
have hderiv :
      (fun x : ℝ => (-2 : ℝ) * cos (x / 2 + 3))' =
        fun x => sin (x / 2 + 3) := by
    funext x
    have hchain :
        deriv (fun x : ℝ => (-2 : ℝ) * cos (x / 2 + 3)) x =
          (-2 : ℝ) * (-sin (x / 2 + 3)) * (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by
      simpa [deriv_mul_const, deriv_const_mul] using
        (by
          simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
            (deriv_const_mul (-2 : ℝ) (fun x : ℝ => cos (x / 2 + 3)) x))
    simpa [hchain, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm,
      add_comm, div_eq_mul_inv] using (by ring_nf)
  have hFTC :
      ∫ x in a..b, sin (x / 2 + 3) =
        (-2 : ℝ) * cos (b / 2 + 3) - ((-2 : ℝ) * cos (a / 2 + 3)) := by
    simpa [hderiv] using
      (intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub (f := fun x : ℝ => (-2 : ℝ) * cos (x / 2 + 3)) a b)
  linarith

have hderiv :
      (deriv fun x : ℝ => -2 * cos (x / 2 + 3)) = fun x => sin (x / 2 + 3) := by
    funext x
    simpa [mul_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, div_eq_mul_inv] using
      (by
        simpa [div_eq_mul_inv] using
          (deriv_const_mul (-2 : ℝ) (fun x : ℝ => cos (x / 2 + 3)) x))
  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt
      (f := fun x : ℝ => -2 * cos (x / 2 + 3))
      (f' := fun x : ℝ => sin (x / 2 + 3))
      (a := a) (b := b)
      (by
        intro x hx
        have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => -2 * cos (x / 2 + 3)) (sin (x / 2 + 3)) x := by
          simpa [hderiv] using (by
            have := (by
              simpa [hderiv] using (show (deriv fun x : ℝ => -2 * cos (x / 2 + 3)) x = _ from rfl))
            exact (hasDerivAt_deriv (fun x : ℝ => -2 * cos (x / 2 + 3)) x))
        exact this))

simpa [mul_sub, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm,
    add_assoc, div_eq_mul_inv] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_add_const (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [mul_sub, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm,
    add_assoc] using
    (integral_sin_affine (a := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (b := 3) a b)

simpa [mul_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_add_const (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, two_mul, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv, add_mul] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_two_add_const (a := a) (b := b) (c := (3 : ℝ))
      (d := (2 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_add, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc,
    mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_add_eq (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv] using
    (integral_sin_mul_add (a := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (b := (3 : ℝ)) a b)

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_comp_div_add (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [two_mul, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv, add_mul, mul_add, neg_mul, mul_neg] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_mul_add (a := a) (b := b) (c := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, sub_eq_add_neg, two_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
    (integral_sin_mul_add (a := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (b := (3 : ℝ)) a b)

simpa [mul_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, two_mul, div_eq_mul_inv] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_add_const (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, div_eq_mul_inv,
    mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_add (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv, (by ring : (2:ℝ) * (1/2) = 1)] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub'
      (f := fun x : ℝ => (-2) * cos (x / 2 + 3))
      (f' := fun x : ℝ => sin (x / 2 + 3))
      (a := a) (b := b)
      (by
        intro x hx
        have h₁ :
            deriv (fun y : ℝ => (-2) * cos (y / 2 + 3)) x =
              (-2) * (deriv (fun y : ℝ => cos (y / 2 + 3)) x) := by
            simpa [deriv_const_mul] 
        have h₂ :
            deriv (fun y : ℝ => cos (y / 2 + 3)) x =
              (-sin (x / 2 + 3)) * (1 / 2) := by
            simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
              (by
                simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
                  (Real.deriv_cos (fun y : ℝ => y / 2 + 3) x))
        have :
            deriv (fun y : ℝ => (-2) * cos (y / 2 + 3)) x = sin (x / 2 + 3) := by
            simp [h₁, h₂, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv]
        simpa [this])
      (by
        intro x hx
        simp))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, div_eq_mul_inv,
    mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_add_const (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, mul_add, add_mul, div_eq_mul_inv] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_add_const (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm,
    div_eq_mul_inv] using
    (integral_sin_mul_add (a := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (b := 3) a b)

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv, (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ)⁻¹ = (1 / 2 : ℝ))] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_add_eq (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, mul_assoc,
    mul_left_comm, mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_mul_add (a := a) (b := b) (c := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, div_eq_mul_inv,
    mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
    (integral_sin_affine (a := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (b := (3 : ℝ)) a b)

have hderiv :
      (deriv fun x : ℝ => -2 * cos (x / 2 + 3)) = fun x => sin (x / 2 + 3) := by
    funext x
    have h1 : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ => x / 2 + 3) x := by
      simpa [div_eq_mul_inv] using
        ((differentiableAt_id.mul differentiableAt_const).add differentiableAt_const : _
          )
    simp [Real.deriv_mul, h1, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
  simpa using (intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (a := a) (b := b)
    (f := fun x : ℝ => sin (x / 2 + 3)) (F := fun x : ℝ => -2 * cos (x / 2 + 3))
    (by
      intro x hx
      have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => -2 * cos (x / 2 + 3)) (sin (x / 2 + 3)) x := by
        have hinner : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => x / 2 + 3) (1 / 2) x := by
          simpa [div_eq_mul_inv] using (by
            simpa using ((hasDerivAt_id.mul_const (1 / 2)).add_const 3))
        simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv] using
          (Real.hasDerivAt_cos.comp x hinner).const_mul (-2) |> (by
            simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using (this.neg))
      simpa using this))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm,
    div_eq_mul_inv] using
    (integral_sin_affine (a := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (b := (3 : ℝ)) a b)

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, mul_add, add_mul, div_eq_mul_inv] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_two_add_const (a := a) (b := b) (c := (3 : ℝ))
      (d := (2 : ℝ)))

simpa [mul_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv, inv_two] using
    (integral_sin_affine (a := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (b := (3 : ℝ)) a b)

simpa [mul_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv] using
    (integral_sin_mul_add (a := a) (b := b) (c := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv, one_div, two_mul, mul_two] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_add_div_two_eq (a := a) (b := b) (c := (3 : ℝ))
      (d := (2 : ℝ)))

simpa [two_mul, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, div_eq_mul_inv,
    mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, neg_add, add_neg, cos_add, sin_add] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_comp_div_add (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv, two_mul] using
    (integral_sin_affine (a := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (b := 3) (c := a) (d := b))

simpa [mul_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
    (integral_sin_mul_add (a := a) (b := b) (c := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))
successful_attempts:
simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, two_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, add_comm, add_left_comm,
    add_assoc] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_add_const (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, two_mul] using
    (integral_sin_affine (a := a) (b := b) (c := (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (d := (3 : ℝ)))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, two_mul] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_sin_div_add_const (a := a) (b := b) (c := (2:ℝ)) (d := (3:ℝ)))
